summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures weakly, today. the main contract I2501 closed 763. an decrease of 1.42% throughout the day;Traders sold according to market conditions, while steel mills restocked as needed.
